_comment_poll: How often the bridge reconciles positions (seconds)
_comment_thresholds: Signal strength needed to open / close positions (0-8 integer scale)
_comment_thresholds2: open=5 requires strong confirmed signal (was 3 = noise). close=2 stays loose.
_comment_dca: Max 1 position per symbol, golden-ratio price spacing for DCA
_comment_profit: Thinker profit-margin TP target (3% matches bridge tp_pct)
_comment_scale: Allow multiple same-side entries when signals stay strong (golden ratio + better-price gate still enforced)
_comment_price_improve: Each additional long/short must be at a better price than previous opens by at least this percent
_comment_atr: ATR-based dynamic SL/TP (overrides sl_pct / tp_pct when enabled)
_comment_trailing: Trailing SL: kicks in after trigger_pct profit
_comment_be: Break-even stop: moves SL to entry once profit >= be_trigger_pct
_comment_partial_tp: Partial TP: close half position at partial_tp_pct profit
_comment_lotsize: DYNAMIC sizing: each trade risks risk_per_trade_pct% of equity on its SL distance
_comment_lotsize2: Lot is calculated as: (equity * risk%) / (entry * sl% * contract_size)
_comment_lotsize3: The 'lot' field below is only a FALLBACK if dynamic sizing fails
_comment_risk: Portfolio risk cap -- blocks new entries when total open risk exceeds this
_comment_daily: Daily drawdown guard: flatten all positions if equity drops this % intraday
_comment_signal_stale: 600s = 5 export cycles of tolerance before signal is considered stale
_comment_phi_dca: Golden-ratio DCA: 1st DCA fires when price drops dca_step1_pct%, each next level is PHI x deeper
_comment_broker_mins: ICMarkets SC-Demo broker minimums: BTC=0.01, ETH=0.1, XRP=100, DOGE=100(contract=100), BNB=0.1
_comment_account: Account $171 @ 500x leverage. DOGE requires $186 min margin (100lots*100contract*$0.093/500) -- too large.
_comment_doge_disabled: DOGE is DISABLED (enable_long/short=false) until account > $250. Re-enable when equity allows.

symbols._comment: min lot=0.01 | $171 equity, 1% risk=$1.71 | sl=2%, entry=$69k -> lot=0.0012 -> snaps to 0.01

DISABLED: ICMarkets SC-Demo DOGUSD has volume_min=100 lots, contract_size=100 -> min margin=$186 at $0.093. Too large for $171 account. Cannot trade below broker minimum. Re-enable at equity>$250, or try DOGEUSD symbol if available on your broker.
